---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One sentence describing the feature.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case is this enabling?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Include API design, config options, or UX changes if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why this one is better.

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] No, I'm requesting it for someone else to implement
